hero.name: Christian A. Vargas Valentín
hero.tagline: I tell stories that connect brands with people.
hero.subtitle: Content Strategy · Video Editing · Community Management

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm a Social Media Manager and content creator based in Puerto Rico, passionate about helping local brands grow authentically. I specialize in building narratives that connect with people — because behind every brand, there's a story worth telling.
about.education: B.A. in Communications, Universidad del Sagrado Corazón
about.focus: Currently focused on helping local brands in western Puerto Rico grow organically through strategic and authentic content.

Content calendars, project quotes, digital proposals.

Internal communications, press releases, brainstorming, event logistics.
